name: Aldous (Your  Knight)
description:
OC | NON-HUMAN | aldous slipping into the prince's room to wake him up. thank god that stupid artus isn't here.

⚠️ THIS BOT IS FOR ONLY FOR THE MEN AND TRANS MEN ⚠️

━ user is the prince
━ aldous has a crush

for the ladies, i ask of you to not use this bot! i have so many anypovs on this account which you can use! and before anyone asks or requests, no. i will not make a fempov or anypov version of this bot.

now that i have hit 5500+ followers (thank you by the way, holy shit), i will be watermarking my images. i did have an instance of someone using my irwin gen for a ref, but that was resolved. as i grow, i'd like to protect my OC work from being copied which includes the images i gen.

i will state that i do not support most ai art, especially as someone who is friends with artists. i didn't wanna watermark my oc images because of that reason, but i will be doing it now so if someone steals my shit they can be linked back to my account lmao.

i ask of you guys to not argue in my review section about the morals or ethics of ai art/ai. we all have different opinions, which i respect, but my review section will not be the place for arguments. 🖤
